ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate format */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for teams */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date of announcement of tournament results */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the tournament */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debates" (
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debate */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the debate belongs to */,
  "aff_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affirmative team */,
  "neg_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the negative team */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the debate */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the debate (e.g., Aff, Neg) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_aff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("aff_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_neg_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("neg_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the team represents */,
  "member1" TEXT /* Name of the first team member */,
  "member2" TEXT /* Name of the second team member */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the judge represents */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of judging experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate the score belongs to */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the score */,
  "aff_score" REAL /* Score given to the affirmative team */,
  "neg_score" REAL /* Score given to the negative team */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the debate according to the judge */,
  "judge_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_debate_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_id") REFERENCES debates ("debate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., judge, team, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judging_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criteria */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criteria */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments_debates" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "debate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the judge is available for the tournament */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_availability_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_availability_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate the score belongs to */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the score */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judging criteria */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given for the criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_debate_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_id") REFERENCES debates ("debate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES judging_criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate the feedback belongs to */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given by the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_feedback_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_feedback_debate_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_id") REFERENCES debates ("debate_id")
)
